name: Orlix B20 Token Skill
description: Full B20 token lifecycle on Base — live gas prices, ETH/ERC-20 balance checks, deep config validation, ABI-encoded deployment bundles with real nonce + gas, token reads, and tx receipts. Real Base RPC calls, no mocks.

demo.title: orlix-b20-demo.sh
demo.code:
# Get live Base chain status + gas prices
curl 'https://orlixai.xyz/api/b20-skill?action=info'

# Read any ERC-20 on Base ($ORLIX token)
curl -X POST https://orlixai.xyz/api/b20-skill \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{ "action": "token_info", "address": "0x799c28BAC95B3E0B26534D1e9A586511895EcBA3" }'

# Check ETH balance of any wallet
curl -X POST https://orlixai.xyz/api/b20-skill \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{ "action": "balance", "address": "0xYOUR_WALLET" }'

# Prepare full B20 deployment bundle (real gas + nonce from Base)
curl -X POST https://orlixai.xyz/api/b20-skill \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{
    "action": "prepare",
    "name": "BNKR Token",
    "symbol": "BNKR",
    "variant": "asset",
    "decimals": 18,
    "supply_cap": "1000000000",
    "admin": "0xYOUR_WALLET",
    "policies": { "blocklist": true }
  }'

# Get full tool manifest (Claude + OpenAI format)
curl 'https://orlixai.xyz/api/b20-skill?action=manifest'

setup: No authentication required — the API is open
POST to https://orlixai.xyz/api/b20-skill with your action and params
GET ?action=info for live chain status and gas prices
The prepare action fetches real gas prices and nonce from Base RPC
Deploys go live when Base activates the B20 standard — save the prepared tx and broadcast then
For a visual configurator, use the B20 Studio at https://orlixai.xyz/b20

actions.name: info
actions.description: Live Base chain status, gas prices, B20 standard details

actions.name: gas
actions.description: Current EIP-1559 gas prices with deploy cost estimate

actions.name: balance
actions.description: ETH balance + optional ERC-20 balance for any address on Base

actions.name: token_info
actions.description: Read name, symbol, decimals, total supply for any ERC-20 on Base

actions.name: validate
actions.description: Validate B20 config + live admin ETH balance + gas estimate from Base RPC

actions.name: prepare
actions.description: Validate + build complete EIP-1559 deployment tx with live gas + nonce from Base

actions.name: receipt
actions.description: Check tx hash status on Base + extract deployed token address from logs

actions.name: manifest
actions.description: Full tool schema in Claude + OpenAI function-calling format
